overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval Gothic classroom interior with students seated at wooden desks, illuminated by natural light from tall arched windows. The scene features detailed wood paneling, hanging chandeliers, and a large ornate door at the far end, rendered in high-quality real-time graphics.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval Gothic classroom interior with students seated at wooden desks. The room features a high vaulted wooden ceiling with hanging iron chandeliers, tall arched windows on the left wall, and a large ornate door at the far end. Natural light diffuses through the windows, illuminating the wood-paneled walls and the sparse crowd of students studying quietly at their desks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric gaze into a medieval Gothic classroom that emphasizes the stillness and scale of the scholarly environment. It begins with a wide view of students seated at wooden desks, where natural light diffuses through tall arched windows to illuminate the wood-paneled walls. As the eye travels upward, the perspective encompasses the high vaulted wooden ceiling and the heavy iron chandeliers hanging above the quiet crowd. The scene then extends its focus toward the far end of the room, finally settling on the imposing presence of a large ornate door that anchors the space.
